projects.title: Pix2ASCII
projects.desc: Pix2ASCII Art Studio is a web application that transforms images into ASCII art using AI-powered analysis via Google Gemini. It allows users to generate stylized text-based art with multiple rendering modes, real-time processing, and high-resolution export options, combining modern AI with retro visual aesthetics.

projects.title: Link-to-QR: Instant Link to QR Code Converter
projects.desc: Link-to-QR is a simple tool that converts any URL into a scannable QR code, making it quick and easy to share links across devices. It helps users instantly access websites by scanning the generated code instead of typing long URLs.

projects.title: RandoTunisie – Hiking Management Platform
projects.desc:
RandoTunisie is a full-stack platform designed to simplify hiking organization across Tunisia. It solves common logistical challenges by providing an efficient system for managing events, participants, and transportation.

The platform includes a smart scheduling algorithm that prevents date conflicts and optimizes bus assignments for multiple trips. It also features real-time Telegram integration, allowing admins to instantly receive and manage join requests.

Users can explore hiking destinations through interactive maps, while the backend ensures secure and scalable data handling. The frontend delivers a modern, responsive experience focused on usability and clean design.

gallery.title: Guinness World Record – AI-Powered Startup Creation Event
gallery.desc: Participated in a large-scale university event at FSEGS (University of Sfax) where hundreds of students collaboratively built a startup using AI tools in record time, contributing to a Guinness World Record initiative focused on innovation and entrepreneurship.
